creator: giffunip@asme.org
text:
The version number of the current port of Yorick reads 1.5.02. The
	correct version number should read 1.5. If 1.5.02 is used for
	the version number then the fetch will not necessarily pick the
	latest de-bugged version of 1.5. The entry yorick-1.5.tgz is
	supposed to be a soft link in the archives to the most de-bugged
	version of 1.5. If 1.5.02 is left as the version number then
	FreeBSD will not be able to track the latest version of yorick-1.5
	as bugs are fixed.

	Incidentally: I am told by the author of Yorick that an important
	bug fix is about to be released as yorick-1.5.03.tgz. When this
	happens, the soft-link will be moved to this new source and
	the FreeBSD users will be left behind unless the version number
	in the Makefile is changed from 1.5.02 to 1.5.

Fix: 

Change version 1.5.02 to 1.5
How-To-Repeat: 	NA
